name: 4.5 fl oz Stoneware Espresso Cup - Threshold™
description:
Celebrate the season of love with this Stoneware Espresso Cup from Threshold™. This espresso cup features a red scalloped rim and "Love" text to add sweet charm to your coffee routine. Made of stoneware, this 4.5-fluid-ounce cup is ideal for serving espresso, and it's dishwasher and microwave safe for easy cleaning and reheating.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
